concerns.text: In main-llmxive.tex, the 'beginappendix' macro definition (line ~105) is malformed. It contains raw text 'Appendix\par}}' and a 'definecolor' block inside the macro body, followed by a closing brace that likely breaks the macro definition. This will cause compilation errors or incorrect formatting when the appendix is triggered. The macro should be a clean wrapper for \appendix and the section title.

In main-llmxive.tex, the 'promptbox' environment is defined via 'newtcblisting' in paper.tex but is used extensively in main-llmxive.tex without the corresponding definition or 'tcbuselibrary' call in the preamble of main-llmxive.tex (lines 20-25). While 'tcolorbox' is loaded, the specific 'promptbox' style and 'breakable' library usage for this custom environment are missing, which will cause 'Undefined control sequence' errors during compilation.

In main-llmxive.tex, the 'beginappendix' macro definition (line ~105) appears to have been corrupted during the extraction process. It includes 'definecolor' commands and raw text 'Appendix\par}}' inside the macro body, which is syntactically invalid for a LaTeX macro definition. This needs to be refactored to properly invoke \appendix and define the section title without embedding arbitrary color definitions or broken braces.

In main-llmxive.tex, the 'beginappendix' macro definition (line ~105) is malformed. It contains raw text 'Appendix\par}}' and a 'definecolor' block inside the macro body, followed by a closing brace that likely breaks the macro definition. This will cause compilation errors or incorrect formatting when the appendix is triggered. The macro should be a clean wrapper for \appendix and the section title.
